top10.title: #tiktoklearningcampaign  The stock market as measured by the S&P 500 is reaching all time highs again! BUT… is this rally sustainable? And what should you watch for in the market to understand more?  In my personal opinion, we need a catalyst. That would be something to fuel an additional AI rally, which seem to be getting with the INTC earnings, or indication of inflation cooling.  Inflation expectations surged post Iran conflict, thus the 2-yr increased more than the 10-yr.  The equity markets have recovered, the other markets have NOT.  Watch that 2-year 👀👀👀  #stockmarketnews #stockmarketanalysis
